title: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in southern Lebanon

snapshot.title: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in southern Lebanon
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: Israeli drone strikes targeted three vehicles in southern Lebanon on Tuesday, killing at least four people and wounding others, Lebanon’s National News Agency (NNA) reported. Two people were killed in a double-tap strike, with a drone hitting a car in the village of Mayfadoun followed by a second strike ‌after people ‌had gathered at the scene. Another drone strike ‌on
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israeli drone strikes kill at least 4 in southern Lebanon | Arab News
